## Description

Describe the change and the user or maintainer outcome it enables.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Tooling or release infrastructure

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant local checks for this change.
- [ ] I updated or added tests where behavior changed.
- [ ] I ran `make schema-check` if schemas or typed models changed.
- [ ] I ran `make package-check` if packaging or release metadata changed.

## Checklist

- [ ] My changes follow the project's style and safety constraints.
- [ ] I performed a self-review.
- [ ] I updated documentation where necessary.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` when the change is user-facing.

## Related issues

Closes #
